products.name: Green Hay
products.description: Green Hay, harvested from nutrient-rich grasses and legumes while still lush, transforms landscapes with its ability to enrich soil and suppress weeds as a premium organic mulch. Its vibrant, nutrient-packed composition breaks down quickly, releasing nitrogen to boost fertility in vegetable gardens or flower beds, perfect for eco-conscious gardeners. Ideal for sheet mulching or compost layering, it fosters healthy soil ecosystems while retaining moisture in sunny, dry areas. Noteworthy for attracting earthworms and supporting lush growth, Green Hay brings vitality and sustainable beauty to your outdoor spaces.

products.name: Straw Hay
products.description: Straw, the golden, hollow stalks left after grain harvests like wheat or barley, is a versatile landscaping essential, perfect for mulching vegetable gardens, pathways, or erosion-prone slopes. Its lightweight, fluffy texture suppresses weeds, retains soil moisture, and insulates plants from temperature extremes, creating a tidy, low-maintenance garden aesthetic. Free of seeds, it minimizes unwanted sprouting, making it ideal for clean, sustainable designs in sunny beds or strawberry patches. Noteworthy for its durability and eco-friendly decomposition, straw adds rustic charm and practicality to any landscape project.

products.name: Urea Fertilizer 50KG
products.description: Urea Fertilizer, with its high nitrogen content (46%), is a cost-effective choice for rapidly greening lawns, fueling dense, leafy growth that enhances curb appeal. Its granular form dissolves quickly, delivering immediate nutrients to grass, ideal for quick recovery after dormancy or heavy use. Perfect for warm-season grasses in sunny climates, it requires careful application to avoid burn. Noteworthy for its affordability and potency, Urea transforms tired lawns into lush, vibrant expanses with minimal effort.

products.name: Calcium Ammonium Nitrate (C.A.N) Fertilizer 50KG
products.description: Calcium Ammonium Nitrate (C.A.N) is a fast-acting, nitrogen-rich fertilizer that delivers a quick green-up for lawns, promoting vigorous grass growth and vibrant color. Its balanced blend of nitrogen and calcium strengthens cell walls, enhancing turf resilience against stress and disease in various soil types. Ideal for spring or early summer applications, it dissolves easily for efficient nutrient uptake, ensuring lush, even coverage. Noteworthy for its low burn risk, C.A.N is a reliable choice for maintaining healthy, durable lawns with consistent care.

products.name: NPK Fertilizer 50KG
products.description: NPK Fertilizer, a versatile blend of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium, is the all-in-one solution for balanced lawn nutrition, fostering lush foliage, strong roots, and disease resistance. Available in various ratios (like 20-10-10 or 16-20-0), it’s tailored to specific lawn needs, from growth spurts to stress recovery, ensuring year-round vibrancy. Easy to apply via spreader, it supports consistent nutrient delivery for uniform greening and durability. Celebrated for its customizable formulas, NPK creates thriving, picture-perfect lawns for every season.

products.name: Diammonium Phosphate (D.A.P) Fertilizer 50KG
products.description: Diammonium Phosphate (D.A.P) is a powerhouse fertilizer packed with phosphorus and nitrogen, perfect for establishing new lawns or reviving weak ones by boosting root development and early growth. Its high phosphorus content strengthens grass roots, ensuring a dense, resilient turf that withstands foot traffic and environmental stress. Best applied during seeding or sodding, it promotes quick establishment in nutrient-poor soils. Renowned for its efficiency, D.A.P transforms sparse lawns into thick, thriving carpets with lasting vitality.
